title: Atlanta Veg Week Kickoff Party
location: Patagonia Atlanta, 65 N Avondale Rd, Atlanta
description: Kick off Atlanta Veg Week at Patagonia! Meet plant-based chefs, sample delicious vegan bites, and learn about the city's week-long celebration of climate-friendly eating. Perfect for couples exploring vegetarian cuisine together.

title: In The Other Room: Dirty South Comedy
location: Helium Comedy Club, 1157 Midtown Ave SE, Atlanta
description: Atlanta's premier comedy club hosts the edgier 'Other Room' show featuring unfiltered stand-up. Great date night for couples who appreciate bold, raw humor. Drinks and food available.

title: SweetWater 420 Fest - Day 1
description: Atlanta's signature spring music festival returns with multiple stages, major touring acts, craft beer from SweetWater Brewing, and epic city skyline views. The ultimate outdoor date festival experience.

title: SweetWater 420 Fest - Day 2
description: Day 2 of Atlanta's premier spring festival. Multiple music stages, local and national acts, craft brews, and food vendors. Great excuse for a picnic date in the park.

title: Root Locals Comedy: Earth Day Celebration
location: 7 Stages Theatre, 835 W Peachtree St NW, Atlanta
description: Laugh for the planet! Local comedians perform to celebrate Earth Day. Fun, conscious, and hilarious. A great date idea for couples who want entertainment with a cause.

title: Date Night Painting - Summer Moon River
location: Painting with a Twist, 180 Cobb Pkwy NW, Kennesaw
description: Couples-friendly painting class creating a beautiful 'Summer Moon River' canvas together. BYOB allowed. Take home your creation as a memorable keepsake from your date night.

title: Bachata x Zouk ATL Weekender - Opening Night
description: Three-day Bachata and Zouk dance festival. Workshops, social dancing, and performances. Perfect for couples looking to learn new dance moves together or show off their skills.

title: STAMPED: AYA x Friends - Atlanta
location: BLOCK & DRUM, 3566 Chamblee Tuckeston Rd, Chamblee
description: Atlanta's hottest Amapiano and Afrobeats party returns! Dance the night away with top DJs playing the best in African rhythm and South African house music. Great vibes for couples who love to move.
